requirements.task_name: Book a 60-minute AI strategy consultation for a manufacturing team on October 10, 2026 at 2:00 PM
requirements.task_description: Use the consultation booking flow to schedule a 60-minute AI strategy session for a manufacturing client with 5 participants on October 10, 2026 at 2:00 PM, with a stated budget range of $10,000–$25,000. Success is achieved when the consultation request form is submitted with all specified details.

requirements.task_name: Select a mid-size AI transformation package under $12,000 with at least 2 workshops and request a proposal
requirements.task_description: From the pricing or packages page, identify a mid-size business AI transformation package that costs $12,000 or less and explicitly includes at least 2 workshops, then submit a proposal request for that package. Success is achieved when a proposal request form is submitted that references the qualifying package.

requirements.task_name: Add 3 short-duration retail AI case studies with ROI ≥ 20% to a reading list
requirements.task_description: From the case studies section, find retail or e-commerce AI projects published between 2022 and 2026 that show ROI of at least 20% and project duration under 6 months, then add 3 such case studies to the site's reading list or saved items feature. Success is achieved when 3 qualifying case studies have been added to the reading list.

requirements.task_name: Complete the AI Readiness Assessment and open the recommended service booking page
requirements.task_description: Fill out the site's AI Readiness Assessment by selecting specified answers, then follow the recommendation to open the booking or contact page for the primary suggested service. Success is achieved when the booking or contact form for the recommended service is reached from the assessment result.

requirements.task_name: Register for a GenAI marketing webinar next month between 11:00 AM and 3:00 PM
requirements.task_description: Find an upcoming webinar related to Generative AI for marketing that takes place next calendar month with a scheduled time between 11:00 AM and 3:00 PM, and complete the on-site registration form. Success is achieved when the registration form for a qualifying webinar is submitted.

requirements.task_name: Configure a financial services AI project estimate and submit a detailed proposal request
requirements.task_description: Use the project estimator to configure an end-to-end AI strategy and implementation project for a financial services client with an 8-person team, a 16-week timeline, and a budget range of $100,000–$250,000 that includes data audit and training but excludes MLOps setup, then submit a proposal request based on this configuration. Success is achieved when the proposal request form with the configured options is submitted.

requirements.task_name: Add 3 AI governance blog posts under 10 minutes read time from the last 12 months to a reading queue
requirements.task_description: From the blog or insights section, find AI governance articles published in the last 12 months with an estimated read time of under 10 minutes and add 3 of them to the site's reading queue feature. Success is achieved when 3 qualifying posts are added to the reading queue.

requirements.task_name: Choose the most affordable remote AI training program for 30 European team members under $8,000 with at least 2 live sessions and start booking
requirements.task_description: From the training or academy section, identify a remote AI training program suitable for a 30-person team in Europe that costs $8,000 or less and includes at least 2 live sessions, then initiate the booking process for the most affordable qualifying program. Success is achieved when the booking form for the selected training program is opened and initial details are submitted.
